Customs Invoice

Place & Date: Helsinki 07.06.2022

Shipper: Tapio Tainola

Wihuri Research Institute

Biomedicum 5th floor, Room A510

Haartmaninkatu 8

FI-00290 Helsinki

Finland

Telephone: +358-50-3102636

Consignee: Bente Halvorsen/Ellen Lund Sagen, Room D1-2009

Research Institute of Internal Medicine,

Oslo University Hospital Rikshospitalet,

Sognsvannsveien 20, 0372 Oslo

Norway

Phone: 0047-98460647

b.e.halvorsen@medisin.uio.no

Contents: Frozen non infectious mouse antibodies

Quantity: 351 pcs, a’1.5 ml.

All substances are for laboratory testing only.

Shipment has no commercial value. Value for customs purposes only: 5 Euros.

I declare all information in this invoice to be true and correct.

Dry Ice, UN1845,10 kg

Sincerely,

Tapio Tainola

Laboratory Coordinator

Wihuri Research Institute

Biomedicum Helsinki, 5th floor, room A510

Haartmaninkatu 8

FI-00290, Helsinki, Finland

USDA Statement

Place & Date: Helsinki 07.06.2022

Shipper: Tapio Tainola

Wihuri Research Institute

Biomedicum 5th floor, Room A510

Haartmaninkatu 8

FI-00290 Helsinki

Finland

Telephone: +358-50-3102636

b.e.halvorsen@medisin.uio.no

Consignee: Bente Halvorsen/Ellen Lund Sagen, Room D1-2009

Research Institute of Internal Medicine,

Oslo University Hospital Rikshospitalet,

Sognsvannsveien 20, 0372 Oslo

Norway

Phone: 0047-98460647

b.e.halvorsen@medisin.uio.no

Contents: Frozen non infectious mouse antibodies

Quantity: 351 pcs, a’1.5 ml.

All substances are for laboratory testing only.

The material was derived only from laboratory mammals that have not been inoculated with or exposed to any livestock or poultry disease agents exotic to the United States. The material was derived only from laboratory mammals that did not originate from a facility where work with exotic disease agents affecting livestock or avian species is conducted.

Sincerely,

Tapio Tainola

Laboratory Coordinator

Wihuri Research Institute

Biomedicum Helsinki, 5th floor, room A510

Haartmaninkatu 8

FI-00290, Helsinki, Finland
